name: 高令宁

appearance.face: 清丽精致，五官锋芒毕露，眼神锐利而倔强
appearance.body: 纤细苗条，姿态高傲挺拔
appearance.hair: 乌黑长发，常挽成精致妇人髻或少女发式
appearance.distinguishing_features: 骄傲抬起的下巴与坚定不移的目光

costume.typical_outfit: 华美绣花汉服长裙，配丝帕与发钗

visual_reference: Elegant young Chinese woman 18-23, sharp determined eyes with proud chin lift, delicate fair features, long jet-black hair in intricate updo or loose maiden style, slender graceful figure, wearing flowing embroidered Hanfu in soft green and pink-purple tones with red accents, cinematic historical drama style, highly detailed face, soft natural lighting
personality: 争强好胜、骄傲自尊、眼里容不得沙子
desire: 再见儿子一面、摆脱前世纠缠、获得平静独立生活
flaw: 过于骄傲冲动、报复心强、拒人千里
arc: 从恨意满满、报复纠缠到彻底原谅并追求自由，最终被男主疯狂追回
scene_presence: 全剧绝对核心，从提亲到江南重逢全程驱动剧情与情绪

relationships.dynamic: 爱恨交织、互相折磨到疯狂纠缠
